name: Evigishki Mind Augus
name_jp: イビリチュア・マインドオーガス
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Gishki" Ritual Spell Card. When this card is Ritual Summoned: Target up to 5 cards in any Graveyard(s); shuffle those targets into the Deck.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Gishki" Ritual Spell Card. When this card is Ritual Summoned: Target up to 5 cards in any Graveyard(s); shuffle those targets into the Deck.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Gishki" Ritual Spell Card. When this card is Ritual Summoned: Target up to 5 cards in any Graveyard(s); shuffle those targets into the Deck.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's Deck
